scripts.build:client: dotnet tool restore && dotnet fable src/Client/KeyboardTrainer.Client.fsproj --outDir src/Client/obj/fable --define PRODUCTION && esbuild src/Client/obj/fable/Main.js --bundle --minify --outfile=src/Client/public/app.js --format=iife
scripts.build:client:dev: dotnet tool restore && dotnet fable src/Client/KeyboardTrainer.Client.fsproj --outDir src/Client/obj/fable --define DEBUG && esbuild src/Client/obj/fable/Main.js --bundle --sourcemap --outfile=src/Client/public/app.js --format=iife
